name: dependabot-reviewer
description: Review, verify, and fix Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts. /dependabot-review approves safe updates and sets automerge. /dependabot-verify reports PR status read-only. /dependabot-fix fixes a single selected PR or broken main-branch CI interactively — analyses autonomously, proposes a repair plan, and executes after user confirmation.
